summary: Middle East conflict escalating — U.S. blockade of Iranian ports driving oil prices higher, risking energy crisis. Strait of Hormuz closure threat. IMF baseline: global growth 3.1%, inflation 4.4% in 2026; adverse scenario 2.5% growth, 5.4% inflation. Additional flashpoints: Venezuela, Iran civil unrest, NATO posture in Greenland.
